title: Exploring Creative Thinking in Product Design
summary: A design-thinking reference with a video embed.
embedHtml: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/WOkBzQbkvBA?si=qgpNNA9Xs-GHI2C1" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

title: Breaking: Data Cures All Disease
summary: A placeholder data essay from the original site.

body.text: In today's rapidly evolving world, creativity is a vital component of successful product design. Whether you're designing a physical product or a digital experience, understanding how creative thinking can shape user interaction is crucial.
This note explores practical ways to sharpen a creative process and turn rough ideas into material you can actually test.

items: Brainstorm freely before narrowing toward a direction.
Map adjacent ideas to find useful collisions.
Reverse the problem to expose assumptions.
Prototype early enough that the work can still surprise you.

body.text: Creative thinking in product design is strongest when it stays close to the person on the other side of the experience.
